the_day_unfolds.light: Warm golden morning: safe, bright, and tender, with only distant wind pressure beginning to disturb the day.
Gold drains into cool blue-grey as the storm rolls in; wind, rain, and lost visibility test Keen’s performed confidence.
Storm-dark shore pierced by combined crystal beacon light, hope visible before safety is guaranteed.
Darkest storm and underwater blue-grey; aquamarine cuff-glow becomes the truthful light of carried love and courage.
Storm breaks into washed-clean warmth; welcome and recognition gather around Keen as the Cove brightens.
Golden-hour calm after rain, warmer than the start, with the ache still present in wet leaves and softened surf.
